final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: tactical gear flat-lay display, square crop
Primary request: hardcore military-style tactical equipment showcase — various firearms, bulletproof vests, and night-vision devices arranged in a neat, orderly layout
Scene/backdrop: dark matte surface, deep charcoal or near-black background with subtle texture
Subject: assorted rifles and handguns, modular bulletproof vests with MOLLE webbing, night-vision goggles — all arranged symmetrically in a flat-lay composition
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, flat-lay editorial
Composition/framing: top-down overhead shot, wide frame, items evenly spaced with precise alignment
Lighting/mood: cold, hard directional side lighting with sharp shadows; austere, authoritative, and imposing atmosphere
Color palette: deep charcoal black background + matte olive drab / coyote tan / dark grey gear + cool steel metallic highlights
Materials/textures: matte polymer firearm bodies, woven ballistic nylon vest panels, rubberized night-vision housing, brushed metal barrels
Constraints: all items must appear inert and static in a display context; no human figures; clean flat-lay arrangement
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, warm or soft lighting, cluttered disorganized layout, watermark
